name: Chicken Breasts with Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Have the butcher bone and cut each breast into halves.
2. Snip beef into small pieces.
3. Cover and microwave beef, celery, onion, and margarine in a 2-Qt casserole on high (100%) until onion is crisp tender, about 3 to 4 minutes.
4. Stir in rice, parsley, and pine nuts. Arrange chicken breasts skin sides up and thickest parts of outside on rice mixture. Sprinkle with seasoned salt and paprika.
5. Cover and microwave for 5 minutes; turn casserole one half turn.
6. Microwave until chicken is done, about 8 to 11 minutes.
